XRP Exchange-Traded Fund approvals are now in the final stages of authorization, with institutional adoption at an all-time high[2]. This development signals imminent regulatory clarity for traditional investors seeking XRP exposure[2].

signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**

The SEC has officially dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, removing a regulatory overhang that suppressed XRP's price for years[1]. This resolution clears the path for institutional capital inflows and has triggered a significant market response, with XRP gaining nearly 10% over the past week and break

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Completed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Completed | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple has officially completed a full-scale rollout of its RLUSD stablecoin across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of mid-April[2]. This represents a major milestone for enterprise adoption and has contributed to record-breaking transaction volume on the XRPL[2].
